mapper.select: SELECT TBU.ID, TBU.USER_EMAIL, TBU.USER_PASSWORD, TBU.USER_PROFILE, TBU.USER_NAME, TBU.USER_CREATE_AT, TBU.USER_NICKNAME, TBU.USER_ROLE, TBU.USER_BIRTH, TBU.USER_INTRO, TBU.USER_JOB, VUA.POST_COUNT, VUA.POST_LIKE_COUNT, VUA.COMMENT_COUNT, VUA.GET_LIKE_COUNT, NVL2(FOLLOWING_ID, 1, 0) AS IS_FOLLOW, CASE WHEN TBU.ID = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_ME FROM TBL_USER TBU JOIN VW_USER_ACTIVITY VUA ON TBU.ID = VUA.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FOLLOWER_ID, FOLLOWING_ID FROM TBL_FOLLOW WHERE FOLLOWER_ID = #{userId} ) TBF ON TBU.ID = TBF.FOLLOWING_ID WHERE ID = #{id}
